column1: # Reduce counts when warnings are fixed. CI fails if new warnings exceed this budget.

column3: 'fullPath(forApplication:)' was deprecated in macOS 11.0: Use -[NSWorkspace URLForApplicationWithBundleIdentifier:] instead.
